title: Mimicer Turkish Dubbed
description: It brings Turkish voiceover to Mimicer texture pack
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf129b2bcac116dcdb3acd20d9c2d40516b11dcf.jpeg)

# Mimicer
## is now fully dubbed in Turkish!
You can now play with a Turkish-speaking Mimicer and enjoy a more immersive and lively experience.
The voice acting is completely localized, bringing extra personality and realism to the game.

### 🎙️ Features

Full Turkish voice-over

Natural and synchronized speech

100% compatible with the original Mimicer experience

Regular updates and improvements

### 📢 Changelog

Mimicer has been fully dubbed in Turkish.
You can now play with a Turkish-speaking Mimicer!

Voice Actor: Hakan Çevik

Developer: SimonNetzack

mimicer türkçe dublaj
